instruction: Water entered our ground floor at midnight. Electricity is still on and my grandparents cannot walk fast.
The nearby hill is cracking after heavy rain and mud is moving toward houses.
Dry winds and smoke are increasing quickly. We have 10 minutes before we must leave.
There is extreme heat, my child has dizziness and we have little drinking water left.
context: Disaster: Heatwave, Location: Rajasthan peri-urban area

instruction: Cyclone warning announced. Our roof is weak and network is unstable.
हमारे इलाके में तेज गर्मी है, दादी बेहोश जैसी लग रही हैं और पानी कम है।
context: Disaster: Heatwave, Location: Rural Uttar Pradesh

instruction: The river rose suddenly and we can hear people shouting for help from across the road.
context: Disaster: Flood, Location: Low-lying town center

instruction: Dust storm plus high temperature, my father has asthma and power is out.
A crack appeared in the wall after continuous rain and the slope behind us is saturated.
My phone battery is 8%. Strong winds and glass are breaking outside.
context: Disaster: Hurricane, Location: Coastal city apartment

instruction: Flash flood hit the market area. I am with two children and one infant.
Smoke is thick indoors and visibility outside is poor due to nearby fire.
Long drought has dried our local well and we have one day of water storage.
context: Disaster: Drought, Location: Sub-Saharan rural village

instruction: Heavy rain, no internet, and the bridge to town may be submerged by dawn.
We heard a landslide 2 km away and now rocks are falling near our road.
context: Disaster: Landslide, Location: Hill road community

instruction: My mother has chest pain in this heat and ambulance response is delayed.
context: Disaster: Heatwave, Location: Small town outskirts

instruction: Strong cyclone winds expected in 2 hours. We have one torch and no backup radio.
हवा में धुआं भर गया है, आंखों में जलन हो रही है और बाहर आग दिख रही है।
context: Disaster: Wildfire, Location: Rural settlement edge

instruction: Our school building is being used as shelter; families need immediate organized guidance.
context: Disaster: Flood, Location: Community relief site

instruction: No rain for months, crop failure started, and children are dehydrated.
